memberdef.argsstring: (const Base< typename T1::elem_type, T1 > &X, const typename T1::elem_type k)
memberdef.name: operator*

memberdef.argsstring: (const typename T1::elem_type k, const Base< typename T1::elem_type, T1 > &X)
memberdef.name: operator*

memberdef.type: arma_inline const mtOp< typename std::complex< typename T1::pod_type >, T1, op_cx_scalar_times >
memberdef.definition: arma_inline const mtOp<typename std::complex<typename T1::pod_type>, T1, op_cx_scalar_times> operator*

memberdef.name: operator*

memberdef.definition: arma_inline const mtOp<typename std::complex<typename T1::pod_type>, T1, op_cx_scalar_times> operator*
memberdef.argsstring: (const std::complex< typename T1::pod_type > &k, const Base< typename T1::pod_type, T1 > &X)
memberdef.name: operator*

memberdef.name: operator*

memberdef.argsstring: (const Op< T1, op_htrans > &X, const typename T1::elem_type k)
memberdef.name: operator*

memberdef.type: arma_inline const Glue< T1, Op< T2, op_diagmat >, glue_times_diag >
memberdef.definition: arma_inline const Glue<T1, Op<T2, op_diagmat>, glue_times_diag> operator*
memberdef.argsstring: (const Base< typename T2::elem_type, T1 > &X, const Op< T2, op_diagmat > &Y)
memberdef.name: operator*

memberdef.type: arma_inline const Glue< Op< T1, op_diagmat >, T2, glue_times_diag >
memberdef.definition: arma_inline const Glue<Op<T1, op_diagmat>, T2, glue_times_diag> operator*
memberdef.argsstring: (const Op< T1, op_diagmat > &X, const Base< typename T1::elem_type, T2 > &Y)
memberdef.name: operator*

memberdef.definition: arma_inline Mat< typename promote_type<typename T1::elem_type, typename T2::elem_type>::result > operator*
memberdef.argsstring: (const Op< T1, op_diagmat > &X, const Op< T2, op_diagmat > &Y)
memberdef.name: operator*

memberdef.type: arma_inline const Glue< T1, T2, glue_times >
memberdef.definition: arma_inline const Glue<T1, T2, glue_times> operator*
memberdef.argsstring: (const Base< typename T1::elem_type, T1 > &X, const Base< typename T1::elem_type, T2 > &Y)
memberdef.name: operator*

briefdescription.para: multiplication of Base objects with same element type

memberdef.type: const mtGlue< typename promote_type< typename T1::elem_type, typename T2::elem_type >::result, T1, T2, glue_mixed_times >
memberdef.definition: const mtGlue< typename promote_type<typename T1::elem_type, typename T2::elem_type>::result, T1, T2, glue_mixed_times > operator*
memberdef.argsstring: (const Base< typename force_different_type< typename T1::elem_type, typename T2::elem_type >::T1_result, T1 > &X, const Base< typename force_different_type< typename T1::elem_type, typename T2::elem_type >::T2_result, T2 > &Y)
memberdef.name: operator*

param.type: const Base< typename force_different_type< typename T1::elem_type, typename T2::elem_type >::T1_result, T1 > &
const Base< typename force_different_type< typename T1::elem_type, typename T2::elem_type >::T2_result, T2 > &

briefdescription.para: multiplication of Base objects with different element types

codeline.highlight: Mat< typename promote_type<typename T1::elem_type, typename T2::elem_type>::result>
Base< typename force_different_type<typename T1::elem_type, typename T2::elem_type>::T1_result,T1>&X,
Base< typename force_different_type<typename T1::elem_type, typename T2::elem_type>::T2_result,T2>&Y
